content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track navigating through this right-hand curve — still on course.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 31, target = (31 + 5) % 121 = 36
- Target waypoint 36: (7.114, 2.2871)
- Car: x=7.0923, y=1.5653, heading=66.34°
- dy = 2.2871 - 1.5653 = 0.7218
- dx = 7.114 - 7.0923 = 0.0217
- bearing = atan2(0.7218, 0.0217) = 88.28°
- delta = 88.28° - 66.34° = +21.94°
- |delta| ≈ 22° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but waypoint 36 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+21.94°), continuing with 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line through the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight heading east (~0°), then sharp right curve around WP26-38",
    "After right curve, track heads west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is left of center (~0.17m) — acceptable entering right curve",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Delta decreasing from +26° to +22° through this curve — smooth progression toward apex",
    "After WP36+, heading will start decreasing (turning right/west) — prepare for negative steering",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used",
    "Car progressing smoothly through right curve, heading increasing from 50° to 66°"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [7.030, 7.048, 7.062, 7.076, 7.092],
    "y": [1.340, 1.393, 1.432, 1.482, 1.565],
    "yaw": [53.30, 56.58, 59.00, 61.37, 66.34]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP36 at (7.114, 2.287): dy=0.722, dx=0.022, bearing=88.28°, delta=+21.94° → moderate left, steer 15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
